context_text: <A> yeah that's great um most of my family we're all pretty much on the west side / <B> uh-huh / <A> so it's not too bad my parents still live in san diego and i have an uncle in la so you know we're only five hours away so it's not too hard to get together but / <B> yeah / <A> i spent some time in florida and so i was so far away from my family that you know it was hard to get together even for holidays you { know you } / <B> [ yeah ] / <A> have to buy a plane ticket and you know have all that time off of work to make { it } / <B> [ mmm ]
